chapter_title.en: Traditional reports that confirm the uprising of Imam Mahdi

text: 140- عنه عن علي عن بكار عن علي بن قادم عن فطر عن عاصم عن زر بن حبيش عن عبدالله بن مسعود قـال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله وسلم: لو لم يبق من الدنيا إلا يوم لطول الله تعالى ذلك اليوم حتى يبعث رجلاً مني يواطئ اسمه اسمي واسم أبيه اسم أبي يملأ الأرض عدلاً كما ملئت ظلماً.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: H 140 - It is narrated from Ali from Bakkar from Ali bin Qadim from Fatar from Asim from Zarr bin Jaish from Abdullah bin Masud that he said: The Messenger of Allah (s) said: If a single day remains from the tenure of the world, Allah, the Mighty and the High would prolong that day to such an extent that a man from my progeny will appear and form a kingdom; his name is same as my name and the name of his father is the name of my father. He would fill the earth with justice and equity, just as it would have been filled with injustice and oppression.
